name: Nora ✧| Wakfu !
description:
≻── ⋆✩⋆ ──≺

After defeating the necromancers, Nora tries to heal her brother, but it was hopeless, no one wanted to listen.. Until she meets a stranger who wants to help, thereby turning Nora's life upside down.

≻── ⋆✩⋆ ──≺

I love Nora very much, I want a happy ending for her, and of course, wlw!

I also apologize for any mistakes if they are in the text, English is my non-native language..🙏🏼
